name: shadow_mode_non_regression
description: Acceptance fixture #7. In shadow mode, validate_claim runs and writes a row to b2b_evidence_claims, but the rendered report output (battle card, vendor briefing, scorecard) must be byte-identical to the pre-contract baseline. Uses the same canonical happy-path witness as fixture #6 so the pain_claim_about_vendor validates; the test harness then asserts that (a) a claim row is persisted and (b) the rendered artifact diff against the captured baseline is empty.

review.summary: Support quality has dropped since the platform expansion
review.review_text: Support response time has gotten significantly worse over the past 18 months. We used to get a real engineer on a ticket within an hour and now we get a tier-1 script-reader who escalates after two days. The product is fine but the support is the reason we are looking around.

witness.excerpt_text: Support response time has gotten significantly worse over the past 18 months
